_comment: Expected output for verify-external.sh. Update on first verified run; PENDING_FIRST_VERIFICATION values are placeholders.
_notes: Canonical glibc + fortify reference. Used to validate F1's glibc-only fortify suppression logic (spec line 83): __*_chk variants should be observed and the bare equivalents should be suppressed only if absent. Also serves as a regression guard against false-positive HIGH findings in well-hardened distro binaries.
